CATALYST-SWITCH.description: Switched cards will be put back in the Draw Pile. A random card from the Draw Pile for each Switched card. Cards obtained this way count as Drawn.
CATALYST-SWITCH.title: Switch
CATALYST-MARK.description: Marked cards will have their position revealed, counted from the top, when in the Draw Pile. Marking a different card removes the mark from the current marked card.
CATALYST-MARK.title: Marked
